text: Day 33 evening: Former Iran FM Kharazi seriously injured, wife killed in Tehran strike. He was reportedly coordinating diplomatic back-channel with Pakistan for possible Vance-Iran meeting. Targeting diplomats signals Israel wants to foreclose negotiation options.

Pezeshkian's open letter to Americans is unprecedented in Iranian wartime diplomacy. Markets interpreted it as strongest ceasefire signal yet — Dow rallied on peace hopes. But Araghchi simultaneously says Iran prepared for 6 months of war. Mixed signals.
verificationNote: Bloomberg published full text. Al Jazeera confirmed.

text: Hormuz transits collapsed to just 6 ships today (from 130/day pre-war). IEA chief Birol warns April will be 'much worse than March.' BCA Research: 4.5-5M bbl/day lost now, could double by mid-April. Britain hosting 35-nation meeting tomorrow on reopening.
verificationNote: NPR, CNBC, Bloomberg confirmed Hormuz data.

text: IRGC Wave 88 of True Promise 4 — coordinated triple-front attack: Iran launched 10 ballistic missiles (cluster warheads) at central Israel on Passover eve, Hezbollah fired at coastal corridor (Herzliya-Ashkelon), Houthis launched 3rd barrage at southern Israel. First confirmed three-front coordinated strike.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Al Jazeera, JNS confirmed multi-front attack.

text: Remember, at first they said this war would be over in four days. Then three weeks. Three weeks have passed, now it's 2-3 more weeks. The timeline keeps extending. Trump to address nation at 9PM — expect more timeline promises. PolitiFact rated 'regime change' claim Mostly False.
verificationNote: PolitiFact fact-check confirmed. CNN, NPR reporting on address.

text: Day 33 PM update (3:24 PM PDT): Kharazi struck in Tehran (wife killed); Pezeshkian open letter to Americans; EU extends sanctions (262 individuals); Gas $4.06; Brent ~$101; DOE 10M barrel SPR exchange; Trump 9PM address; 35-nation Hormuz meeting tomorrow; IDF 400+ strikes in 48hrs; coordinated Iran-Hezbollah-Houthi Passover barrage.
verificationNote: Compiled from AAA, CNBC, Al Arabiya, Al Jazeera, NPR, JURIST, DOE.
